message:
fix(web): fix array mutation bug and remove dead imports in OperatorSelector

- Fixed critical bug where hasCustomizations used .sort() which mutates
  arrays in place, corrupting both the value prop and DEFAULT_OPERATORS constant.
  Now uses [...array].sort() to create copies before comparing.
- Removed unused AGENT_ROLES import from OperatorSelector (dead code)
- Removed unused prompt-builder import from OperatorsClient (broke build)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
